commands.review_summary:
The PR changes session-memory transcript summarization to collapse adjacent identical assistant text and adds regression coverage for delivery-mirror, thinking-cleaned duplicates, distinct replies, and repeated replies after visible user turns.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +129. Total +141 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main appends every extracted user/assistant text row, so a raw thinking assistant entry followed by a cleaned text-only entry with the same visible text produces duplicate memory lines. I did not run a live thinking-enabled model flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is recommended because the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a concrete code defect ClawSweeper can patch.
